lines.en_lit: Peh, zayin, reish, kuf, shin, beit,

However, with regard to compensation it is compensation for first as didn’t we learn One who did not celebrate on the first Festival day celebrate the whole Festival in its entirety, the last Festival day of the festival
And say Shavuot, it is sequestering of seven for one day. Rabbi Abba said: one derives one bull and one ram, from one bull and one ram, to the exclusion of Shavuot, they are two rams

This well to the one who said Yom Kippur is one ram; however, to the one who said they are two rams what is there to say? As it was taught Rabbi says: One ram is the one that is mentioned here; it is the one that is mentioned in the book of Numbers: Rabbi Eliezer, son of Rabbi Shimon, says: They are two rams one mentioned here and one mentioned in the book of Numbers.
Even you say Rabbi Eliezer, son of Rabbi Shimon, There, one for the obligation of the day, and one additional offerings. to the exclusion of Shavuot, where both are obligations of the day.

And say Rosh HaShana, as it is sequestering of seven for one day. Rabbi Abbahu said One derives a bull and a ram from his own from a bull and a ram from his own to the exclusion of Shavuot and Rosh HaShana, from community This well to the one who said Take you, from your own
